submissions.text:
| Sarah J. Chen
October 26, 2023

Introduction to Computer Networks

A Computer network is a collection of computers and devices connected

together to share resources, information, and communication.
1. LAN (Local Area Network) - connects devices in a small geographic area

(e.g., home, office).
2. WAN (Wide Area Network) - spans a large geographic area (eqg,, the Interne).

Basic_Network Diagram

S=
NIC (Network Interface Card): connects the device to the network
Router: forwards data packets between networks

Protocol: rules for data transmission (e.g., TCP/IP, HTTP)

To have any network components, innovons, and miority to access the
benefits of network benefits: es

* Resource sharing (printers, files

* Communication (email, messaging

* Access to remote information
